title: astragalus paucijugus
intro: Astragalus paucijugus, also known as the few-jointed milkvetch, is a plant species in the legume family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and increasing energy levels. Astragalus paucijugus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
